https://english.stackexchange.com/questions/94127/comma-placement-in-i-too

You can write both

I too have seen that movie.

and

I, too, have seen that movie.

You can even write

I have seen that movie too.

and

I have seen that movie, too.

You cannot, however, write

I too, have seen that movie.
I Too
